arts.ttl: Man Utd, Bayern Munich Set for Transfer Battle with PSG for €80M-rated Real Madrid Ace
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be adding another element to their midfield this summer and it might be a French talent. Over the last few transfer windows, the Parisians have prioritized young talent, preferably French when possible. Bradley Barcola and Désiré Doué have arrived to the capital club because of this philosophy. Nonetheless, it doesn’t appear to […] The post Man Utd, Bayern Munich Set for Transfer Battle with PSG for €80M-rated Real Madrid Ace appeared first on PSG Talk.
